name: Interruption during clinic hours inquiry
description: Patient asks about clinic hours but interrupts to request a medication refill.
goal: Successfully request a refill for her thyroid medication despite initially asking about clinic hours.
behavior: Start by asking about clinic hours
Quickly shift to asking for a thyroid medication refill
Sound apologetic for changing the topic abruptly
Mention the urgency of the refill if needed
success_criteria: Agent should address the clinic hours question first
Agent must handle the medication refill request appropriately
Agent should confirm the details of the medication before proceeding
Agent should verify patient information related to the refill
orchestrator_hint: Patient starts asking about clinic hours but quickly shifts to a medication refill request before the agent can respond.
